description: Cache, compare, and diff Find Me Gluten Free cities from your terminal. Multi-city trip compare, lat/lng radius search, city-wide review feeds, and safety-report filters the consumer app can't show.

novel_features.name: Multi-city trip compare
novel_features.description: Compare 2+ cities side-by-side: dedicated-GF count, GF-menu count, total places, average rating, and top-rated picks per city — the question the consumer apps can't answer.

novel_features.name: City diff since last sync
novel_features.description: Show what changed in a city since the last time you synced it: added/removed places, rating drift, new low-star safety reports.

novel_features.name: Lat/lng radius search
novel_features.description: Find dedicated-GF or GF-menu places within a radius of a lat/lng using Haversine over locally cached schema.org geo data.

novel_features.name: City stats rollup
novel_features.description: One-shot SQL aggregate over a city: count, average rating, p50/p90 rating, dedicated-GF percent, GF-menu percent. Filterable by cuisine.

novel_features.name: City-wide recent reviews
novel_features.description: Newest reviews across every place in a city, sorted by datePublished. Filter to safety-report-style 1-2 star reviews with --max-rating.

novel_features.name: Watchlist with change report
novel_features.description: Watch specific places; periodic 'watch report' fetches each and reports rating drift and new low-rated reviews since the baseline.

novel_features.name: Cuisine cross-city compare
novel_features.description: For one cuisine across multiple cities: per-city count, dedicated-GF percent, top-rated place. Useful when planning where on a trip GF pizza (or burgers, or bakery) is most available.

novel_features.name: Safety-report review filter
novel_features.description: Filter cached reviews for one place to those mentioning got-glutened / cross-contamination keywords from a curated, deterministic list — no LLM.
